message:
feat: in-process GitPorcelain, zerobuf submodule, zero npm deps

- Wire FS_BUCKET into ProcessManager for in-process git via GitPorcelain
- Replace DO RPC git routing with direct GitEngine/GitPorcelain calls
- Fix merge result shape (strategy field) and grep result mapping
- Add zerobuf as git submodule, remove npm dependency
- Update gitmode submodule to latest (pre-allocated scratch ABI)
- Add Vite resolve aliases for vendor path mappings
- Remove unused @ts-expect-error on node:crypto import

files.patch:
@@ -1,3 +1,6 @@
 [submodule "vendor/gitmode"]
 	path = vendor/gitmode
 	url = git@github.com:teamchong/gitmode.git
+[submodule "vendor/zerobuf"]
+	path = vendor/zerobuf
+	url = https://github.com/teamchong/zerobuf.git

@@ -4,16 +4,22 @@
     "module": "ESNext",
     "moduleResolution": "bundler",
     "lib": ["ES2022"],
-    "types": ["@cloudflare/workers-types"],
+    "types": ["@cloudflare/workers-types", "node"],
     "strict": true,
     "noEmit": true,
     "skipLibCheck": true,
     "esModuleInterop": true,
     "forceConsistentCasingInFileNames": true,
     "resolveJsonModule": true,
     "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
-    "outDir": "dist"
+    "outDir": "dist",
+    "paths": {
+      "gitmode/git-engine": ["./vendor/gitmode/src/git-engine.ts"],
+      "gitmode/git-porcelain": ["./vendor/gitmode/src/git-porcelain.ts"],
+      "gitmode/wasm-engine": ["./vendor/gitmode/src/wasm-engine.ts"],
+      "zerobuf": ["./vendor/zerobuf/src/index.ts"]
+    }
   },
-  "include": ["src", "worker"],
-  "exclude": ["node_modules", "src/deploy.ts", "vendor"]
+  "include": ["src", "worker", "vendor/gitmode/src", "vendor/zerobuf/src"],
+  "exclude": ["node_modules", "src/deploy.ts", "vendor/gitmode/test", "vendor/gitmode/src/worker.ts", "vendor/gitmode/src/pack-worker.ts", "vendor/gitmode/src/server.ts", "vendor/gitmode/src/index.ts", "vendor/zerobuf/src/index.test.ts", "vendor/zerobuf/src/index.bench.ts"]
 }
